subject: Team Rocket's Venture Bomb — a round black bomb with a lit fuse bearing the Team Rocket R emblem
description: A round black bomb sits centered in the image with a short lit fuse extending from its top. The bomb face prominently displays a large red R on a black circular badge — the Team Rocket faction emblem. The lit fuse glows with a small flame. The background is plain and minimal, keeping focus entirely on the object. The overall design is bold, graphic, and immediately legible as a cartoon bomb.
foreground: round black bomb with glowing fuse and Team Rocket R emblem
